text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Wednesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, March 26. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing our household budget today. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Budget tracking is updated. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sleep quality is so important. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good focus area. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. First United Mortgage offered 5.5% with zero points. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. A rate of 5.5% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that i'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I checked the recent logs for that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Ethan did great with his school homework. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
